Main Teachings/Errors: Secret knowledge for salvation; dualism; rejection of material world
Church Response & Condemnation: Refuted by Irenaeus (Against Heresies); condemned by councils

Main Teachings/Errors: Rejected OT, taught dual gods (OT vs NT), edited NT canon
Church Response & Condemnation: Excommunicated, condemned by early councils

Main Teachings/Errors: Claimed new prophecy, strict morality, denied forgiveness of mortal sin
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by bishops and synods

Main Teachings/Errors: Christ only seemed human; denied true incarnation
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by early Fathers, e.g., Ignatius

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied Christ’s divinity, insisted on Mosaic Law
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by early Fathers

Main Teachings/Errors: Christ is a created being, not co-eternal with the Father
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at First Council of Nicaea (325)

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied distinct persons in Trinity; God appears in modes
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by Church Fathers, local synods

Main Teachings/Errors: Christ is two persons (divine and human), Mary not Theotokos
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Ephesus (431)
Additional Notes: Led to lasting schism in East

Main Teachings/Errors: Christ has only one nature (divine absorbs human)
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Chalcedon (451)

Main Teachings/Errors: Validity of sacraments depends on minister’s purity
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Arles (314), Augustine refuted

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied original sin, affirmed human ability to achieve salvation without grace
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Carthage (418), Ephesus (431)

Main Teachings/Errors: Human will initiates faith, grace completes it
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Second Council of Orange (529)

Main Teachings/Errors: Dualistic cosmology (light vs darkness), syncretic
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by Augustine and councils

Main Teachings/Errors: Dualism, rejection of OT, iconoclasm
Church Response & Condemnation: Persecuted by Byzantine Empire

Main Teachings/Errors: Dualism, rejection of sacraments, material world evil
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Third Lateran Council (1179), Albigensian Crusade

Main Teachings/Errors: Rejected church hierarchy, denied some sacraments, lay preaching
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Third Lateran Council (1179)

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied transubstantiation, papal authority, promoted vernacular scripture
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Constance (1415)

Main Teachings/Errors: Similar to Lollardy, criticized church abuses, promoted communion in both kinds
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Constance (1415), Hus executed

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied universal atonement, irresistible grace, pessimistic view of human nature
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by Pope Innocent X (1653), Bull Unigenitus (1713)

Main Teachings/Errors: Denied Trinity, Christ’s pre-existence, original sin
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned by Catholic and Protestant authorities

Main Teachings/Errors: Rejected papal authority, sola scriptura, denied some sacraments
Church Response & Condemnation: Condemned at Council of Trent (1545–1563)
